heal_once.discovery: [93m[ Amidst the iron and dust, you find a miracle: a corner blooming with green moss and tiny flowers. ][0m
heal_once.flavor: [90m(It is a warm space, seemingly hidden by intent, where the Reaper's chilling aura cannot reach.)[0m
heal_once.confirm: 🌿 Will you rest in this place filled with the warmth of life? (This respite is granted only once.)
heal_once.decline: > You decide to save this precious warmth for later.
heal_once.process: [32m[ The small flowers at your feet glow, soothing your wounds and exhaustion... ][0m
heal_once.success: ✨ The blessing of life spreads through your body, and all your conditions are perfectly restored!
heal_once.cleanup: [90m(The exhausted flowers vanish into transparency, and the cold air of the terminal returns.)[0m

caron.whisper_alive: Caron: "(From beyond the shadows) My lord, I am here. Do you require preparations?"
caron.whisper_dead: [Void Guide]: "...Mas...ter... Com...mand... me..." (An eerie chill clings to your ankles.)

map_scan.confirm: 📍 You've found a worn-out area map. Would you like to inspect it?
map_scan.revealed: [90m[ Wiping away the dust... The layout of the current sector is revealed ][0m
map_scan.boss_location: [33m🔍 A warning sign says [DANGER: HOSTILE ENTITY - DO NOT ENTER] at a specific point.[0m
map_scan.boss_flavor: [90m   (Someone has frantically scribbled "STAY AWAY" over it.)[0m
map_scan.fail_flavor: [90m(The remaining information is too defaced to read.)[0m

abandoned_corpse.discovery: 🔍 [1mWhile searching the area, you discover something on the cold floor...[0m
abandoned_corpse.found_msg: It is the corpse of a [[31m{{name}}[0m]. It seems to have been dead for a long time.
flavors: There are traces of a brutal attack by someone.
The corpse is covered in an unidentified, alien slime.
The pockets have already been picked, and only the fishy smell of blood remains.
The body is unnaturally twisted, suggesting it died in absolute terror.

voice_recorder.found: [90m[ You found an official recording device dropped by the rusty tracks ][0m
voice_recorder.confirm: 📽️ Play the voice log "For Terminal Management Office Submission"?
voice_recorder.playing: [90m[ Playing voice log stored in the management system... ][0m
script: ...Static. Loading Dock Unit 402, reporting today's work status.
More Soulstones were unloaded today than scheduled due to an increase in cargo trains to Purgatory.
Workers are suffering from severe wear and tear, reducing efficiency, but quotas were met per management guidelines.
Requesting a more efficient rotation for future relief personnel. End of report.
...Has anything ever actually changed just because we requested it?
He probably forgot we're even part of the machinery here.
...By the way, have you heard any news about the Resistance?

conveyor.prompt_1: ⚙️ Board the conveyor heading to Platform 2?
conveyor.prompt_2: ⚙️ Activate the conveyor heading to Platform 1?
conveyor.move_1: The belt screams as it carries you toward Platform 2...
conveyor.move_2: Reverse gears engage, racing you back to Platform 1!
conveyor.arrival: [32m✨ Whoosh—! Safely arrived at the destination. [{{x}}, {{y}}][0m
conveyor.error: [31m⚠️  Static... Could not find the connected loading path ({{target}}).[0m

warp.message: The space shatters like a mirror, casting you into an unfamiliar place.

default_talk: ...So, you've come here to find your grave.

victory.log: 🏆 You have defeated the formidable foe, {{name}}!

portal.spawn: ✨ [Notice] A [Portal] leading back to the starting point shimmers in the middle of the silent room.
